targets.rawSql: SELECT started_at, strategy_name, status, verdict, summary->>'dominant_verdict' AS dominant, summary->>'promote_recommendation' AS recommend, (summary->>'stability_index')::numeric AS stability, (summary->>'median_auc_oos')::numeric AS median_auc_oos, (summary->>'total_pnl_oos')::numeric AS total_pnl_oos, summary->>'n_folds' AS n_folds FROM research.walk_forward_runs WHERE started_at > now() - interval '30 days' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 100;

panels.title: Median OOS AUC per run, by strategy

targets.rawSql: SELECT started_at AS time, strategy_name AS metric, (summary->>'median_auc_oos')::float AS value FROM research.walk_forward_runs WHERE summary->>'median_auc_oos' IS NOT NULL AND started_at > now() - interval '30 days' ORDER BY started_at;

panels.title: Stability index per run, by strategy

targets.rawSql: SELECT started_at AS time, strategy_name AS metric, (summary->>'stability_index')::float AS value FROM research.walk_forward_runs WHERE summary->>'stability_index' IS NOT NULL AND started_at > now() - interval '30 days' ORDER BY started_at;

panels.title: Latest per-fold detail (most recent run per strategy)

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (strategy_name) id, strategy_name, splits FROM research.walk_forward_runs ORDER BY strategy_name, started_at DESC) SELECT l.strategy_name, (f->>'fold')::int AS fold, (f->>'is_from')::timestamptz AS is_from, (f->>'oos_from')::timestamptz AS oos_from, (f->>'auc_is')::numeric AS auc_is, (f->>'auc_oos')::numeric AS auc_oos, (f->>'brier_oos')::numeric AS brier_oos, (f->>'n_trades_oos')::int AS n_oos, (f->>'pnl_oos')::numeric AS pnl_oos, f->>'verdict' AS verdict FROM latest l, LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(l.splits) AS f ORDER BY l.strategy_name, fold;
